messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi, I need some urgent help with an order that was sent to Texas by mistake. I want to return everything in that order except for the pet bed, and I’d like the refund to go back to my Amex card. Also, I need the tracking number for that order. I don’t have the order number handy—can you help me with this?

I found the order sent to Texas! It's order **#W5565470**, shipped to Houston, TX. The tracking number is **907614527588**. 

The order contains:
1. Electric Kettle (stainless steel, black, 1L) — $153.25
2. Mechanical Keyboard (linear, no backlight, full size) — $231.37
3. Pet Bed (medium, fleece, grey) — $196.53

You mentioned you'd like to return everything except the Pet Bed — so that would be the Electric Kettle and Mechanical Keyboard.

However, regarding the refund to your Amex card — I don't see an Amex card on your account. Your payment method on file is a PayPal account. Per our policy, refunds can only go to the original payment method (PayPal in this case) or an existing gift card on your account. Unfortunately, you don't have a gift card on file either.

Would you like the refund to go to your PayPal account instead?
